title: cymbachne guineensis subvar. cordofana
intro: Cymbachne guineensis subvar. cordofana, also known as the Cordofan cymbachne, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cymbachne guineensis subvar. cordofana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or powders, and it can also be used to make essential oils and other medicinal products.
